## Steps to Reproduce

2. Run command '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

```
Paste error output here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| ToastyKey Version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| OS | e.g. macOS 15.3, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 |
| Node.js Version | e.g. 20.11.0 |
| npm Version | e.g. 10.4.0 |
| Provider Affected | e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic, ElevenLabs, All |

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. Screenshots, logs, or reproduction repos are very helpful.
